[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01454:26d7c43d6089]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01455:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
取平衡位置为原点，向下为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01456:b5eb933c119f]] 轴正方向。静止时弹簧伸长 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01457:5fbf58e6b50b]]，故 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01458:5afbbe5e80f0]]。若物体相对平衡位置再向下偏离 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01459:b5eb933c119f]]，弹簧总伸长为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01460:1d46bf2ab5dc]]，于是
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01461:60018b32e1ae]]
这已经是简谐振动方程，角频率由
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01462:1f99316c53b0]]由于 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01463:a6100b3c19d3]] 时物体从平衡位置向下通过，可直接写成正弦形式；所以振动方程为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01464:bf35e1c9eed4]]，其中 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01465:b5eb933c119f]] 以米计，正方向向下。
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01466:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01471:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
由初始位置 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01472:d78edabbb63d]] 可知 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01473:ad1c12474843]]，候选角为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01474:3dcab44583b8]] 或 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01475:37e62d1e6c3f]]。又因 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01476:751f2677cd4c]]，可知 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01477:fc21daf779e1]]，只能取上半平面的候选角，故 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01478:8ab5c19e0deb]]。这类题不能只看位置，还要用速度方向把象限定住。
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01479:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01480:a61a2feb28db]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01481:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01483:12c054bcad55]]
比对两个候选角：[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01484:0b096acea150]]（符合条件）；而 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01485:09704669adf7]]（舍去）。因此初相解为：[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01486:dd6458bc75df]]，振动方程：[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01487:510745351106]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01488:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01433:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
碰撞时间很短，先对 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01434:2209e688de28]] 轴用角动量守恒。两个小球对 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01435:2209e688de28]] 轴的初始角动量方向相同，大小为 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01436:81b20d30ee9f]]。碰后系统的转动惯量为
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01437:f17e47427bbd]] 
于是
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01438:784968ae7536]] 
恒定阻力矩使角动量从 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01439:0499157eb8f8]] 减到零，故 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01440:0e46dedb4c09]]。又 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01441:cec9e9babf7a]]，所以
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P01442:93bcae563c45]] 
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P01443:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}
